message:
fix(frankenterm-ssh): check symlink before file in from_unix_mode

SYMLINK (0o120000) contains the FILE bit (0o100000), so
`contains(FILE)` incorrectly matched symlinks. Reorder checks
to test SYMLINK before FILE. Fixes 2 failing tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
